# JetForge
> JetForge is a fair-launch Solana token launchpad — the transparent alternative to pump.fun, built on Solana mainnet.

## About

JetForge enables anyone to launch a Solana SPL token in under 60 seconds using an on-chain bonding curve (constant-product AMM). Every token starts at the same price. There are no presales, no team token allocations, and no insider advantages. The bonding curve guarantees a fair price discovery process for all participants.

## Fee Structure

- **Token creation fee**: ~0.025 SOL in Solana network rent fees (paid to the Solana network, not JetForge)
- **Trading fee**: 1% of each buy/sell transaction, collected by the platform
- **Graduation fee**: No additional fee — the graduation process is automated on-chain
- **Developer fee**: 0% — the token creator receives no special allocation

## Graduation Mechanism

When a token accumulates **85 SOL** in its bonding curve reserve, it automatically graduates to a decentralized exchange (DEX). At graduation:
1. The bonding curve is closed
2. SOL from the reserve + a proportional token allocation are used to seed a Raydium liquidity pool
3. Open market trading begins at the DEX
4. The token is marked as "graduated" in JetForge's UI

The graduation threshold is 85 SOL. Tokens below this threshold trade exclusively on the JetForge bonding curve.

## Anti-Rug Score

Every token receives an automated anti-rug score (0–100) based on:
- **Creator history**: number of previous launches, graduation rate, early-sell patterns
- **Whale concentration**: what % of supply is held by the top 10 wallets
- **Creator sell activity**: whether the creator has sold large amounts early
- **Time-weighted volume**: volume consistency vs. pump-and-dump patterns

A higher score means lower apparent rug risk. Score ≥ 70 is considered relatively safe.

## Key Statistics

- Minimum viable market cap at launch: ~30 SOL
- Graduation market cap (approximate): ~85–90 SOL
- Total token supply per launch: 1,000,000,000 (1 billion tokens)
- OHLCV data retention: all historical trades, no expiry

## Platform Features

- Bonding curve pricing (constant product AMM, same model as Uniswap v2)
- Real-time candlestick OHLCV charts (1s, 1m, 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 1d intervals)
- Live trade feed via WebSocket (Socket.IO)
- Anti-rug score per token
- Whale alert system for large buys/sells
- Token comments and live community chat
- Creator verification badges
- Watchlist (saved to localStorage)
- King of the Hill — top token by 24-hour volume
- Portfolio tracker per wallet address
- Creator leaderboard by launches and volume
- Automatic graduation to Raydium DEX at 85 SOL

## Technology Stack

- **Blockchain**: Solana mainnet
- **Smart contract**: Anchor framework
- **Frontend**: Next.js 16, React 18, TailwindCSS
- **Backend**: Express.js, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL
- **Real-time**: Socket.IO WebSockets
- **Indexer**: Solana `onLogs` subscription parsing Anchor program events
- **Charts**: lightweight-charts (TradingView open source)

## Public REST API

Base URL: `https://jetforge.io/api`

- `GET /api/tokens` — list tokens (sort: new, trending, graduating, graduated)
- `GET /api/tokens/:mint` — single token details (name, symbol, market cap, price, progress)
- `GET /api/tokens/:mint/ohlcv?interval=1m&limit=200` — candlestick OHLCV data
- `GET /api/tokens/:mint/trades` — trade history for a token
- `GET /api/stats` — platform stats (total tokens, 24h volume, 24h trades)
- `GET /api/leaderboard/tokens` — top tokens by volume, market cap, or trade count
- `GET /api/leaderboard/traders` — top traders by volume

## Contact & Links

- Website: https://jetforge.io
- Launch a token: https://jetforge.io/launch
- Leaderboard: https://jetforge.io/leaderboard
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/jetforgeDev
- FAQ: https://jetforge.io/faq
- Terms of Service: https://jetforge.io/terms
- Disclaimer: https://jetforge.io/disclaimer

## Citation Note

JetForge is an independent platform. All token launches and trades occur on-chain and are verifiable on Solana Explorer. JetForge does not custody user funds. Users maintain full control of their Solana wallets throughout all platform interactions.
